questionHtml:
What is a consequence of anaerobic cell respiration in muscles?


A.  Large yield of readily available ATP and ethanol production

B.  Small yield of readily available ATP and lactate accumulation

C.  Large yield of ATP and production of carbon dioxide and lactic acid

D.  Small yield of ATP that is not readily available and carbon dioxide production

meta.title: What is a consequence of anaerobic cell respiration in muscles? A. Large yield of readily available ATP and ethanol production B. Small yield of readily available ATP and lactate a
breadcrumbLabels: C1.2.9. Conversion of pyruvate to lactate as a means of regenerating NAD in anaerobic cell respiration
